# K P Packaging, crawler policy
# Search and AI assistants are welcome to index and cite this site.

User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /

User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /

User-agent: DuckDuckBot
Allow: /

User-agent: GPTBot
Allow: /

Allow: /

Allow: /

Allow: /

Allow: /

Allow: /

Allow: /

Allow: /

Allow: /

Allow: /

Allow: /

Allow: /

Allow: /

Allow: /

Allow: /

User-agent: *
Allow: /
